Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places

RIGHT: rose
TOP: screwdriver
BOTTOM: mirror
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: eraser
NORTHEAST: helium
SOUTHWEST: wrench
SOUTHEAST: lyre
HERE: cobalt
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: utility blade
EVERYWHERE: bluebell
INSIDE: iodine
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: carbon
RIGHT: rose
TOP: screwdriver
BOTTOM: mirror
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: eraser
NORTHEAST: helium
SOUTHWEST: wrench
SOUTHEAST: lyre
HERE: cobalt
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: utility blade
EVERYWHERE: bluebell
INSIDE: iodine
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
